name: Onion and Apple Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onions and cut them into 1/8 inch slices.
2. Peel, core, and slice the apples to match the onion slices.
3. Cook the bacon in a pan until crispy. Remove it from the pan and mince it.
4. Reserve two tablespoons of bacon fat. Toss the bread crumbs with the remaining bacon fat.
5. Grease a baking dish.
6. Arrange alternating layers of onions, apples, and bacon in the dish.
7. Pour hot stock or water over the ingredients.
8. Sprinkle the bread crumbs evenly over the top.
9. Cover the dish and bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes.
10. Remove the cover and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes.
From Apple Recipes by the Connecticut Apple Marketing Board and
the Connecticut Department of Agriculture
